pi_items.source: Verified against the synthetic email subjects hardcoded in setup_task.sh (with regex escaping for parenthesis).

privileged_info_summary: The environment synthetically generates 4 bounce emails directly into the Thunderbird Inbox during setup. The true failed recipient addresses embedded in these emails are j.doe@expired-domain.com, former_employee@corp.example.com, sales-info@invalid-domain.net, and admin@old-startup.io. The target file for the extracted addresses is confirmed to be /home/ga/Desktop/bounced_contacts.txt and the required destination folder is Bounces. The subjects of the generated emails match the expected patterns perfectly.
